response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile full-stack engineer with genuine distributed-systems exposure (low-latency services at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second) and clear mentoring/leadership signals through workshops, courses, and founding an open-source platform. However, this role hinges on deep C++ expertise (8 years required) and the resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) plus a thesis project. There is no production cloud compute platform experience and no formal technical-leadership tenure of the scale required. The core hard requirements are not met.
strengths: Distributed/high-throughput systems experience (millions of req/s, low-latency, async I/O)
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing (workshops, courses, OSS founder)
Broad full-stack and DevOps/CI-CD background across many domains
concerns: Far short of 8 years C++; only ~6 months of C/C++ work experience
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale cloud architecture experience
Primary stack is TypeScript/Node/DLang, not aligned with C++ infra focus
